event_blocks.summary: Peppa and George Pig arrive at Granny and Grandpa Pig's house for lunch in their red car. They are greeted warmly by Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig, and invited to pick vegetables from the garden. George, initially hesitant about tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumbers, eventually finds a way to enjoy them when presented creatively, particularly when associated with dinosaurs. The family gathers in the kitchen where the harvested vegetables are washed and prepared into a salad by Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig, with Granny Pig's assistance. Grandpa Pig calls everyone to lunch, and they are seated at the dinner table laden with pizza and the fresh salad. While the family enjoys the meal, George's initial reluctance towards the vegetables is overcome when Mummy Pig cleverly presents them, leading to his contentment and a full stomach. The narrative concludes with George being too full to eat any more, signifying a successful and enjoyable family meal.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue dinosaur costume, initially distressed and making disgusted 'Yuck!' sounds when offered vegetables, later excitedly mimicking 'A dinosaur!' and making a 'Grrr!' sound, happily eating a creatively arranged pea pod and tomato slice, and finally stating 'No' in a satisfied tone when offered more food.

Daddy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a teal shirt and glasses, seated at the dinner table, initially concerned, then demonstrating eating with distinct munching sounds, speaking in a clear voice to encourage George by turning food into a 'dinosaur,' and later asking if George is full, looking relieved and amused.

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a pink dress, serving vegetables to George with a gentle, comforting voice, asking him to try food, praising him with 'Well done, George!', and softly calling his name at the end.

Red Car.description: A red car with a smiling face, driving up the hill to the house, accompanied by the sound of a car driving.

House.description: A white two-story house with a purple roof, situated on a green hill, featuring a front door and multiple windows, visible as the family approaches.

Garden.description: A well-tended garden with rows of lettuce, tomato plants with red tomatoes, and a cucumber patch with large green cucumbers and yellow flowers, where the sound of watering can be heard.

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, seated at the dinner table, smiling as she watches George eat.

Watering Can.description: A green watering can used by Grandpa Pig to water the lettuce plants in the garden, producing splashing sounds.

Yellow Basket.description: A woven yellow basket filled with cucumbers, tomatoes, and lettuce, held by Peppa Pig and later placed on the kitchen counter, containing vegetables that were heard being washed.

Grandpa Pig.description: An older pink pig wearing a purple outfit, seated at the dinner table, smiling as the family enjoys their meal.

Kitchen.description: An indoor kitchen with purple walls, a window with floral curtains, a clock showing 10:10, a calendar with a house drawing, and a sink with a faucet, where the family prepares and eats dinner.

Forks and Knives.description: Black utensils placed on the dinner table, used by the family to eat their meal.

Dinner Table.description: A round wooden table set with plates, glasses of juice and wine, pizza slices, and a bowl of salad, where the family enjoys their meal together.

Salad Bowl.description: A striped purple and white bowl filled with chopped vegetables, used to serve the salad during dinner.

Pizza Slices.description: Triangular slices of pizza with colorful toppings, served on plates at the dinner table, and mentioned by Granny Pig as being made for lunch.

Pea Pod.description: A large green pea pod creatively arranged on George’s plate with small green pea pieces and a tomato slice, designed to make the meal more appealing to him.

raw_segments: The scene opens on a bright, sunny day with upbeat, playful background music, showcasing a white house with a purple roof nestled on a green hill under a blue sky with fluffy clouds and a shining sun. As a red car drives up the hill, accompanied by the sound of a car, the word 'Lunch' appears in bold green letters, and a voice announces "Lunch!" The narrator explains that "Peppa and George have come to Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house for lunch." Peppa Pig, in her red dress, stands at the front door, excitedly exclaiming "Granny Pig!", followed by George Pig, in his blue dinosaur costume, making a gurgling "Danky Pig!" Granny Pig, with a gentle female voice, greets them, "Hello, my little ones." The Pig family—Mummy Pig in a pink dress, Daddy Pig in a teal shirt with glasses, Peppa, and George—gather outside the house, smiling. Granny Pig then asks, "Would you like to pick some vegetables from the garden for lunch?", to which Peppa enthusiastically replies, "Yes, please!" Amidst playful giggling, the family walks toward a vibrant garden where Grandpa Pig, wearing a purple outfit, is watering lettuce with a green watering can. The garden is rich with tomato plants bearing ripe red tomatoes, leafy greens, and a tree with yellow flowers. Peppa excitedly calls out "Grandpa Pig!", and George adds his "Papa Pig!" Grandpa Pig, with a deep male voice, greets them, "Hello, Peppa, George!" The narrator highlights, "This is Grandpa Pig's vegetable garden. He has grown all these vegetables himself." George, still in his dinosaur costume, playfully interacts with the plants, even letting out a dinosaur growl. Grandpa Pig, noticing George, asks "What's this?", and Peppa quickly identifies him as a "Dinosaur!", prompting an amused "A dinosaur! Ho ho ho!" from Grandpa Pig. The narrator then suggests, "Let's choose some vegetables for lunch," as Peppa holds a yellow basket. Grandpa Pig picks tomatoes and places them into it, asking Peppa, "Peppa, do you like tomatoes?" She happily confirms, "Yes, Grandpa Pig!" The family appears happy and engaged in the garden activity, enjoying the sunny day together as Grandpa Pig begins to address George.

The video opens with George Pig, dressed in his blue dinosaur costume, looking worried beside his green dinosaur toy in a garden with leafy plants, as Grandpa Pig, in a purple outfit, asks in a warm, grandfatherly voice, "You like tomatoes?" George, with a young voice, replies, "No," prompting Peppa Pig, in her red dress, to confirm, "George does not like tomatoes." Grandpa Pig happily picks red tomatoes from tall plants, placing them into Peppa's yellow basket, then waters lettuce with a green watering can, accompanied by splashing sounds. He asks, "Do you both like lettuce?" Peppa cheerfully responds, "Yes, Grandpa Pig," but George again states, "No," leading Peppa to reiterate, "George does not like lettuce." Expressing an "Oh dear," Grandpa Pig resolves to find "something that George likes." The scene shifts to a cucumber patch where George looks concerned again, exclaiming "Yuck!" when Grandpa Pig asks if he likes cucumber. Daddy Pig, with a calm voice, summarizes George's extensive dislikes: "George does not like cucumbers, and he does not like lettuce, and he does not like tomatoes." Grandpa Pig then directly asks, "Well, George, what vegetable do you like?" to which George surprisingly replies, "Chocolate cake!" This elicits Peppa's laughter and her playful correction, "Silly George. Chocolate cake isn't a vegetable." Grandpa Pig laughs heartily, then suggests, "Maybe George will like the vegetables when they're made into a lovely salad," as Peppa laughs once more. The family, including Mummy Pig in a pink dress and Daddy Pig in a teal shirt with glasses, gathers smiling in their kitchen, featuring a purple wall, a window with floral curtains, and a clock showing 10:10, as Peppa proudly presents the basket of harvested vegetables. Grandpa Pig admires the "lovely fresh tomatoes, lettuce and cucumber," all set to a gentle, cheerful background tune.

The video opens in a cheerful kitchen with purple walls, a clock showing 10:10, and floral curtains. Peppa Pig, in her red dress, proudly presents a yellow basket brimming with freshly harvested cucumbers, tomatoes, and lettuce to a smiling Mummy Pig in her pink dress and Daddy Pig in his teal shirt and glasses. George Pig, excited in his blue dinosaur costume, joins them. The audio then reveals the prior activity of Peppa and George, with Granny Pig (unseen), actively washing the vegetables, accompanied by the sound of running water, splashing, and Peppa's excited giggles and squeals, as the narrator states, "First, we have to wash them," and "Peppa and George help Granny Pig wash the vegetables." After the washing, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig are seen preparing a salad, chopping cucumbers and arranging the vegetables, while the narrator explains that Granny Pig has made the salad from the tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumber. Granny Pig's voice is then heard asking, "Grandpa Pig, can you call everyone to lunch?" Grandpa Pig, in his deep voice, loudly exclaims, "Lunch!" The scene transitions to a warm dinner setting where the family, now including Grandpa Pig in his purple outfit, is seated around the table. The table is laden with plates, glasses of juice and wine, and slices of pizza, which the narrator confirms Granny Pig also made for lunch. Granny Pig's voice announces, "And here's some salad, made with Grandpa's tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumber." Grandpa Pig enthusiastically encourages everyone to "Tuck in, everyone!" Mummy Pig serves the salad, and Peppa happily eats her portion with a fork, alongside a slice of pizza. Chewing sounds are heard as the family enjoys their meal. However, George looks at his plate with a slightly concerned expression. The narrator reveals that "George has eaten his pizza, but George does not like the tomatoes, or the lettuce, or the cucumber." Mummy Pig, with a concerned tone, asks, "Oh dear, George. Don't you like the salad?" to which George, in his small, high-pitched voice, simply replies, "No." The atmosphere remains warm and cheerful, emphasizing family togetherness and healthy eating, despite George's pickiness.

The video opens in a kitchen with purple walls, floral curtains, and a clock showing 10:10, where Mummy Pig, in a pink dress, smiles warmly. The scene quickly shifts to the dinner table where George Pig, a small pink pig in a blue dinosaur costume, sits distressed. Mummy Pig's gentle voice is heard asking, "George, just try a little bit of this lovely tomato," as she offers him a tomato on a fork. George responds with a disgusted "Yuck!" Mummy Pig then offers cucumber, explaining in her voice, "George, this is cucumber. Grandpa Pig grew it in his garden," but George again rejects it with a louder, more intense "Yuck!" Daddy Pig, in a teal shirt and glasses, tries next, suggesting in his clear voice, "Try a piece of lettuce, George. It's yummy." George's rejection escalates into a crying "Yuck!" and distressed sounds, prompting Mummy Pig to comfort him, "Oh now, now, George." Daddy Pig then demonstrates, making distinct eating sounds and declaring, "Look what I'm doing. Now it's a dinosaur." George, excited, mimics, "A dinosaur!" and makes a "Grrr!" sound. A narrator's voice confirms, "George loves dinosaurs," as eating sounds are heard. Mummy Pig places a plate with a creatively arranged green pea pod and a small tomato slice in front of George. The narrator's voice continues, "George is eating the tomatoes, lettuce, and cucumber," as George's expression changes to delight and he happily eats the pea pod, picking at the peas with a fork. Mummy Pig praises him, "Well done, George!" with more eating sounds. Peppa Pig, in a red dress, and Grandpa Pig, in a purple outfit, are also seated at the full dinner table, which is set with plates, glasses of juice and wine, pizza slices, and a striped purple and white salad bowl. Mummy Pig then asks, "Would you like some more, George?" George, now full and content, replies with a clear "No." Daddy Pig, with a relieved and slightly amused expression, asks, "George, are you too full to eat any more tomatoes, lettuce, or cucumber?" The narrator concludes, "George is too full to eat any more," as George finishes his meal with a big smile, his plate empty except for the fork. Mummy Pig softly calls his name, "George," as Daddy Pig smiles warmly at him.

event_blocks.summary: The Pig family's supermarket trip begins with Daddy Pig, holding a handwritten shopping list, asking for help. Mummy Pig notes they need tomatoes, spaghetti, onions, and fruit. Peppa Pig excitedly volunteers to find them. Inside the vibrant supermarket, Daddy Pig pushes a shopping cart with George Pig, in his blue dinosaur costume, giggling inside. Peppa leads the way, and Daddy Pig remarks on how much they enjoy shopping, especially George sitting in the trolley. In the produce section, after being reminded they need tomatoes first, Peppa spots and counts four tomatoes, placing them in a plastic bag and then into the trolley. Daddy Pig checks off 'Tomatoes' from his list. George mispronounces 'spaghetti' as 'paghetti,' which Daddy Pig gently corrects. Later, Peppa finds the spaghetti, a long yellow item, and places it in the trolley. Mummy Pig corrects George's pronunciation of spaghetti again. When asked what's next, Peppa guesses 'crisps,' but they aren't on the list. George guesses 'dinosaur,' leading to laughter. Daddy Pig reveals the next item is 'onions,' which Peppa repeats. The family then moves to the fruit section. After considering apples, oranges, and bananas, George excitedly chooses a large watermelon. Peppa also selects a long yellow item, possibly the spaghetti again, as they head towards the beverage aisle.

Supermarket.description: An indoor setting with blue checkered flooring and shelves filled with colorful goods, featuring cheerful, light background music and the family's dialogue.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue dinosaur costume, seated happily in the shopping cart, who giggles, expresses a disappointed "Oh", suggests "Bananas?" and "A melon!" with a very young, high-pitched voice, and makes a distinct "tee-hee" sound.

Shopping Sign.description: A large oval sign with a green shopping basket icon, mounted on top of the supermarket building, with the word 'Shopping' appearing in purple text below it.

Dinner Table.description: A round wooden table set with plates, each holding a slice of cake with a cherry on top, where the family gathers to eat together.

Daddy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a teal shirt and glasses, who pushes the shopping cart, holds a handwritten shopping list, checks off items with a smile, and speaks in a deep, calm voice, confirming "Very good," questioning "A plant?", clarifying "The last thing on the list is fruit," describing "apples and oranges and bananas, and a very big melon," and suggesting "Oranges?". He places the watermelon into the cart.

Kitchen.description: An indoor kitchen with purple walls, a window with floral curtains, a clock showing 10:10, a calendar with a house drawing, and a sink with a faucet, where the family prepares and eats dinner.

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing an orange dress, who smiles warmly, says "Well done!", reminds the family about "one last thing on the list," reassures George, and asks "Where is the fruit?" and "What fruit shall we have, George? Apples?" in a warm, gentle voice. She picks up a large green watermelon.

Red Car.description: A red car with a smiling face, driving up to the supermarket and stopping as the family exits.

Produce Section.description: An indoor area of the supermarket with shelves filled with fresh vegetables such as asparagus, radishes, potatoes, and pumpkins, visible as the family browses.

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, who excitedly picks carrots, counting them aloud ("One, two, three, four!"), exclaims "Onions!", points "Over there!", and giggles frequently with a high-pitched, enthusiastic voice. She also selects a long yellow item from the fruit shelf.

Shopping Cart.description: A metal shopping cart with a basket, pushed by Daddy Pig, with George Pig seated inside, containing a bag of carrots and later the watermelon, with sounds of movement and items being placed inside.

Grandpa Pig.description: An older pink pig wearing a purple outfit, seated at the dinner table, smiling as the family enjoys their meal.

Handwritten Shopping List.description: A white piece of paper with blue scribbled text, held by Daddy Pig, used to track grocery items during the shopping trip, and audibly referred to by Daddy Pig and Mummy Pig.

Carrots in Plastic Bag.description: A clear plastic bag containing several orange carrots with green tops, held by Peppa Pig after she selects them from the produce section, accompanied by sounds of being picked and counted.

Beverage Aisle.description: A supermarket aisle with shelves stocked with bottles of juice in various colors (red, green, yellow) and canned goods, where the family moves toward the end of their shopping trip.

Long Yellow Item.description: A long, yellow, curved vegetable or fruit, possibly a banana or squash, selected by Peppa Pig from the fruit shelf.

Watermelon.description: A large green watermelon with dark stripes, selected by Mummy Pig and placed into the shopping cart by Daddy Pig, accompanied by a distinct "boing" sound and a thud.

Fruit Section.description: An indoor supermarket area with shelves displaying various fruits, where Mummy Pig and Peppa Pig make selections, and where the family discusses fruit options.

raw_segments: The scene opens in the kitchen with a warm, smiling Mummy Pig asking if George Pig is too full to eat, as George looks sad at the dinner table with an empty plate, making snorting sounds. Daddy Pig narrates that George is indeed too full. Mummy Pig then offers 'chocolate cake,' prompting a smiling Peppa Pig to exclaim 'Chocolate cake!' George, now happy, giggles and makes eating sounds as Mummy Pig serves him a creatively arranged plate with a pea pod and tomato slice. The family, including Daddy Pig and Grandpa Pig, gathers around the Dinner Table, all smiling and laughing as they enjoy their meal, with Daddy Pig remarking that George has got his appetite back. Playful, upbeat music begins as the scene transitions to an exterior shot of a Supermarket with a 'Shopping' sign under a sunny sky. The Red Car arrives, and the family exits, entering the store. Inside, Daddy Pig pushes a Shopping Cart with George Pig seated in it, giggling and snorting, while Peppa Pig walks beside them. Daddy Pig narrates that 'Peppa and George are going shopping' and 'like shopping,' with George loving 'sitting in the trolley.' As they browse the Produce Section, filled with vegetables like asparagus and radishes, Peppa, looking excited, asks Daddy Pig if she can sit in the trolley too, but Daddy Pig replies she's 'too big,' leading to a disappointed sound from Peppa.

The video opens with a cheerful Peppa Pig, in her red dress, smiling brightly at a produce display filled with potatoes, mushrooms, and asparagus. Daddy Pig, wearing his teal shirt and glasses, appears beside her, holding a handwritten shopping list, and asks in his deep voice, "help with the shopping?". Peppa excitedly exclaims, "Oh, goody!" Mummy Pig, in her orange dress, joins them, stating in a clear voice, "We've got four things on the list," which Daddy Pig elaborates on: "Tomatoes, spaghetti, onions, and fruit." Peppa confidently declares, "I'll find it all!" The family then walks into the vibrant yellow supermarket, marked by a red roof and a green shopping basket sign, as a cheerful jingle begins to play. Inside, Daddy Pig pushes a shopping cart, whose distinct rolling sounds accompany George Pig's happy squeals and giggles from within, dressed in his blue dinosaur costume. Peppa, leading the way, calls out "This way!" as Daddy Pig fondly remarks, "Peppa and George love shopping." They navigate colorful aisles stocked with bottles of juice and condiments. Peppa explores the produce section, and while the visual shows her selecting carrots, the family's dialogue focuses on finding tomatoes. Mummy Pig reminds Peppa, "first we need tomatoes." Peppa, after a thoughtful hum, spots them, excitedly announcing, "I can see them, I can see them!" and then, "Here are the tomatoes, Mummy!" Daddy Pig praises her, "Well done, Peppa!" Peppa then counts "One, two, three, four" as she places the tomatoes into a clear plastic bag, and Mummy Pig instructs her to "put them in the trolley." Peppa triumphantly declares, "Ah, found the tomatoes!" Daddy Pig again commends her, "Well done, Peppa," and checks off the item on his list, stating, "Tomatoes. That's one thing off the list." He then asks, "What's next on the list?", to which Peppa eagerly replies, "Spaghetti!" George Pig adorably mispronounces it as "Paghetti!", prompting Daddy Pig to gently correct him, "That's right, George, but it's called spaghetti," though George charmingly repeats "Paghetti!" The atmosphere remains cheerful and bright, with vibrant colors and neatly organized shelves, reflecting a typical family grocery outing.

The brightly lit supermarket aisle buzzes with a cheerful atmosphere as the Pig family embarks on their shopping trip. Daddy Pig, in his teal shirt and glasses, pushes the shopping cart, which Mummy Pig refers to as a "trolley," with a smiling George Pig seated inside, wearing his blue dinosaur costume. Daddy Pig's deep voice is heard wondering aloud where the spaghetti is, noting it's Peppa and George's favorite food. Peppa Pig, in her red dress, initially holding a bag of carrots, excitedly exclaims "I can see it! This way! Spaghetti!" as she spots and later selects a long yellow item from the well-stocked shelves, confirming it's the spaghetti. Mummy Pig, in her orange dress, joins them, her warm voice praising Peppa and suggesting they put the spaghetti in the trolley. George Pig, from the cart, adorably attempts to pronounce the word, saying "P-getti!", which Mummy Pig gently corrects to "Spaghetti." Daddy Pig chuckles warmly at George's attempt. As Daddy Pig checks off items on his handwritten shopping list, he asks Peppa what's next. Peppa guesses "Crisps!", but Daddy Pig's voice clarifies they aren't on the list, with Mummy Pig adding they have plenty at home. Peppa then hums thoughtfully, unable to remember, prompting Mummy Pig to ask George. George enthusiastically guesses "Dinosaur!", leading to more laughter from Daddy Pig and Mummy Pig's gentle explanation that there aren't any dinosaurs in the supermarket. Finally, Daddy Pig reveals the next item on the list is "Onions," which Peppa repeats, as the family continues their happy shopping adventure amidst shelves filled with colorful canned goods like pineapple, strawberries, and green vegetables, alongside bags of yellow spiral-shaped snacks.

The video opens with cheerful, light background music as Peppa Pig, in her signature red dress, excitedly exclaims "I remember now!" and "Here they are!" while selecting a bag of carrots from the brightly lit supermarket's produce section. She counts "One, two, three, four!" with giggles as she hands the carrots to Mummy Pig, who, dressed in orange, warmly says "Well done!" Daddy Pig, in his teal shirt and glasses, pushes the shopping cart, where George Pig, in his blue dinosaur costume, sits happily. Daddy Pig holds a handwritten shopping list, checking off items with a smile as they pass shelves of gardening supplies. Peppa then loudly declares "Onions!" as she places something down. Daddy Pig confirms, "Very good. That's nearly everything on our list." Mummy Pig adds, "There's one last thing on the list." George Pig giggles and makes a sound, prompting Daddy Pig to ask, "A plant? Is that on the list?" Daddy Pig then clarifies, "Oh no, George. The last thing on the list is fruit." George expresses a small "Oh" of disappointment, but Mummy Pig reassures him, "Never mind, George. You can choose the fruit," which makes George giggle again. Peppa excitedly points, "Over there!" as Mummy Pig asks, "Where is the fruit?" In the fruit section, Daddy Pig describes the options: "There are apples and oranges and bananas, and a very big melon." Mummy Pig asks George, "What fruit shall we have, George? Apples?" Daddy Pig suggests "Oranges?", and George chimes in with "Bananas?" before excitedly declaring "A melon!" with a distinct "boing" sound followed by a thud as a large green watermelon is picked by Mummy Pig and placed into the cart by Daddy Pig. Peppa also selects a long yellow item. The family, with Peppa and George giggling, continues their cheerful grocery run, moving towards the beverage aisle.

event_blocks.summary: Upbeat background music accompanied the supermarket checkout scene where a cashier rabbit scanned items, including tomatoes, spaghetti, onions, melon, and a chocolate cake, with the cash register emitting 'beep' sounds and displaying increasing totals. Upon scanning the cake, Peppa Pig exclaimed, 'Chocolate cake!', prompting Daddy Pig, who was pushing a shopping cart with George Pig, to question if it was on the list. After Mummy Pig confirmed neither she nor George had put it in, Daddy Pig admitted he thought it would be nice for pudding, leading to Peppa calling him 'Naughty Daddy!' Mummy Pig, finding the cake 'rather yummy,' suggested they pretend it was on the list, which was met with cheers from Peppa and Daddy Pig. The scene then transitioned outdoors to a sunny day with a yellow house on a green hill, and a red car with a smiling face arrived, signaling a 'Picnic.' The family exited the car, and the upbeat supermarket music shifted to a gentle tune. Daddy Pig placed a yellow picnic basket containing bread, cheese, tomatoes, and lemonade into the trunk, and after Peppa requested 'Mummy's strawberry cake,' which the narrator confirmed was present, Daddy Pig asked if everyone was ready. Peppa and George Pig responded affirmatively, and the family drove away through green hills. They stopped on a grassy hill where Daddy Pig spread out a red-and-white checkered picnic blanket. Mummy Pig held a striped thermos, and while Daddy Pig suggested exercise, Mummy Pig preferred to eat and nap. Peppa commented on Daddy Pig's large tummy, which he denied, promising exercise later. After eating sandwiches, Daddy Pig, feeling sleepy, fell into loud snores. Peppa then spotted a duck pond with three yellow ducklings, and Mummy Pig agreed to let Peppa and George feed them the remaining bread, resulting in excited quacks from the ducklings amidst small yellow flowers and a single white cloud.

Beverage Aisle.description: A blue bottle with a white star label and a yellow juice carton, placed on the picnic blanket.

Handwritten Shopping List.description: A white piece of paper with blue scribbled text, held by Daddy Pig, used to track grocery items during the shopping trip, shown clearly as he checks off items.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue outfit, smiling happily, who giggles excitedly during the picnic and asks Mummy Pig if they can feed the ducks.

Long Yellow Item.description: A long, yellow, curved vegetable or fruit, possibly a banana or squash, selected by Peppa Pig from the fruit shelf.

Cashier Rabbit.description: A white rabbit with long ears, wearing a yellow shirt, operating a beige cash register with a digital display, scanning groceries with a smile.

Chocolate Cake.description: A round, brown, multi-layered chocolate cake with a decorative wavy pattern on the base, placed on the checkout counter and scanned by the cashier. It becomes the subject of a family discussion, with Daddy Pig admitting to adding it for pudding, and is enthusiastically desired by the children.

Daddy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a teal shirt and glasses, spreading a red-and-white checkered picnic blanket, who denies his tummy is big with a snort, promises exercise later, expresses hunger, finds the food 'delicious' with satisfied sounds, then feels sleepy, insists 'later' when reminded of exercise, and snores loudly.

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing an orange dress, holding a blue-and-white striped thermos, smiling warmly, who suggests it's time to eat, reminds Daddy Pig of his exercise promise, and gives permission to feed the ducks, offering them bread.

Watermelon.description: A large green watermelon with dark stripes, placed on a plate on the picnic blanket, partially sliced.

Cash Register.description: A beige electronic cash register with a green digital display showing increasing totals (0.45, 0.69, 3.95, 8.99), and a receipt printer spitting out a paper receipt. It emits distinct 'beep' sounds as items are scanned.

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, smiling joyfully, who comments on Daddy Pig's 'big' tummy, giggles excitedly during the picnic, and later spots the duck pond, asking to feed the ducks.

Fruit Section.description: An indoor supermarket area with shelves displaying bananas, pineapples, watermelons, grapes, and other colorful fruits, where Mummy Pig and Peppa Pig make selections.

Supermarket.description: An indoor setting with blue checkered flooring and shelves filled with colorful canned goods and packaged foods, including pineapple, strawberry, and green vegetable cans, as well as bags of yellow spiral-shaped snacks.

Picnic Title Card.description: A bright blue sky background with a yellow sun, white clouds, a green hill, a yellow house with a red roof, and the word 'Picnic' in green text, signaling the next scene.

Red Car.description: A red car with a smiling face, heard with engine sounds as it drives and a distinct car horn honk.

House.description: A yellow two-story house with a red roof, situated on a green hill, visible as the family arrives and departs.

Shopping Cart.description: A metal shopping cart with a basket, pushed by Daddy Pig, with George Pig seated inside, containing a bag of carrots and later the long yellow item.

Picnic Blanket.description: A red-and-white checkered blanket spread on a grassy hill, serving as the centerpiece for the family picnic.

Yellow Basket.description: A woven yellow basket filled with bread, cheese, and a bottle, explicitly mentioned by Daddy Pig as the "picnic basket" containing "bread, cheese, tomatoes, and lemonade."

Grapes.description: A bunch of purple grapes on a white plate, part of the picnic spread.

Salad Bowl.description: A striped purple and white bowl filled with chopped vegetables, placed on the picnic blanket.

Sandwiches.description: Two long sandwiches with green fillings, served on white plates on the picnic blanket, later eaten by the family.

Ducklings.description: Three small yellow ducklings with orange beaks and feet, swimming in a small blue pond, making distinct quacking sounds, especially loud and excited when being fed bread by the family.

Pond.description: A small, oval-shaped blue pond surrounded by green grass and yellow flowers, where three ducklings swim and are fed by George Pig.

Cheese.description: A block of yellow cheese with holes, placed on a white plate on the picnic blanket.

raw_segments: The scene opens with upbeat, light background music as a narrator introduces the supermarket checkout. A cheerful white rabbit cashier scans items with distinct 'beep' sounds from a beige cash register, which displays increasing totals. The narrator lists the items: 'Tomatoes,' 'spaghetti,' 'onions,' 'melon,' and finally, a round chocolate cake. As the cake is scanned, Peppa Pig excitedly exclaims, 'Chocolate cake!' Daddy Pig, pushing a shopping cart with George Pig inside, questions in his deep British accent, 'Chocolate cake? Is that on the list?' Mummy Pig, standing beside them, calmly asks Peppa if she put it in the trolley, to which Peppa replies, 'No, Mummy.' Mummy then asks George, who also responds with a small, high-pitched 'No.' Mummy states she didn't put it in, prompting Peppa to ask, 'Then who did?' Daddy Pig lets out a characteristic 'Oink' before admitting, 'I thought it might be nice for pudding.' Mummy Pig, exasperated, exclaims, 'Daddy Pig!' George Pig giggles, and Peppa Pig calls him 'Naughty Daddy!' Daddy Pig apologizes, saying, 'it just looked so delicious.' Mummy Pig agrees it 'does look rather yummy' and suggests, 'Oh, let's pretend it was on the list.' Peppa Pig joyfully shouts 'Chocolate cake!' again, and Daddy Pig cheers 'Hooray!' as the family laughs and cheers. The scene then transitions to an outdoor setting with a bright blue sky and a yellow house on a green hill. A red car with a smiling face drives up to the house, accompanied by car driving sounds, and the word 'Picnic' appears in green text. The family exits the car, ready for their outing, as the upbeat supermarket music transitions to a gentle, melodic tune.

The video opens with cheerful, whimsical background music as the Pig family's red car, featuring a smiling face, arrives at their yellow house on a sunny day. A child's voice, identified as Peppa Pig, excitedly exclaims "Picnic!" as the car engine sounds. The Narrator confirms it's a "lovely, bright sunny day" and that "Peppa and her family are going for a picnic." Daddy Pig, wearing a teal shirt and glasses, exits the car and places a yellow basket, which he identifies as the "picnic basket" containing "bread, cheese, tomatoes, and lemonade," into the trunk. He then asks if anything is forgotten, prompting Peppa to eagerly ask for "Mummy's strawberry cake!" Daddy Pig chuckles, teasing her, before the Narrator confirms "Mummy's homemade strawberry cake is there too." With a deep, booming voice, Daddy Pig asks, "Is everybody ready?", to which Peppa and George Pig respond with a unified "Ready!" Daddy Pig then commands, "Then let's go!", and the family drives away in their car, accompanied by engine sounds and a car horn, traveling along a road through green hills under a bright sun and fluffy clouds. Daddy Pig chuckles again as they stop on a grassy hill, declaring, "This looks like just the spot for our picnic." He spreads out a red-and-white checkered picnic blanket, while Peppa squeals "Yay!" in excitement. The family gathers around, smiling and enjoying the sunny weather. Mummy Pig, in an orange dress, holds a blue-and-white striped thermos. Daddy Pig suggests they "run around a bit and get some exercise," but Mummy Pig, in a calm, gentle voice, expresses her preference to "eat, then have a nap," stating she "certainly don't want to run around." Peppa then begins to say, "Maybe Daddy..." as the segment concludes.

The Pig family enjoys a sunny picnic on a grassy hill under a clear blue sky. Peppa Pig, in her red dress, comments that Daddy Pig's tummy is quite big, to which Daddy Pig, wearing his teal shirt and glasses, snorts and denies it, promising to get exercise later. Mummy Pig, in her orange dress, suggests it's time to eat, and Daddy Pig, expressing his hunger, agrees. As they eat sandwiches, Daddy Pig savors the "delicious" food with satisfied sounds, while Peppa and George Pig giggle. After the meal, Daddy Pig sighs, feeling "quite sleepy," prompting Mummy Pig to remind him of his earlier promise to run around, though he insists "later" before falling into loud, rumbling snores. Suddenly, Peppa exclaims, "Look, there's a little duck pond!" as distinct quacking sounds are heard. Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George approach the small pond where three yellow ducklings swim. George asks Mummy Pig if they can feed the ducks, and she agrees, offering them the rest of the bread. Peppa and George giggle excitedly as they throw the bread into the pond, and a narrator confirms their love for feeding ducks, while the ducklings respond with loud, excited quacks, swimming towards the treat. The cheerful atmosphere is enhanced by small yellow flowers dotting the green grass and a single white cloud in the sky.

event_blocks.summary: Peppa Pig smiles and winks before the scene shifts to a pond where a duckling swims towards her, and George Pig's voice asks about more food, but Mummy Pig explains they have no more bread, to which George apologizes to "Mrs. Duck." As ducklings are seen in the pond, Daddy Pig spreads a picnic blanket on a grassy hill, and the family gathers. Daddy Pig comments on the ducks wanting more food, then joins the family, remarking on his exercise. The picnic includes watermelon, grapes, cheese, a salad bowl, and a thermos. When ducklings approach, George suggests offering strawberry cake, and Mummy Pig agrees to give any leftover cake to the ducks. Mummy Pig offers a slice to a duckling, which accepts, and Daddy Pig praises Mummy Pig's homemade strawberry cake. As the family enjoys their cake, a bee, mistaken for a wasp, buzzes near them. Mummy Pig exclaims about hating wasps and shoos it away, while Daddy Pig calmly removes it, advising it to stay still. The scene then shows Daddy Pig holding a slice of cake, surprised by the bee, and exclaiming "Get away!" as he runs from it, with Peppa expressing concern and Mummy Pig reassuring her. The family decides to eat their cake before the bee returns, and Daddy Pig spreads the blanket, revealing watermelon, grapes, cheese, and sandwiches. As ducklings approach, George realizes they forgot to save cake for them. Daddy Pig, still recovering from his chase, states he lost the bee, and Mummy Pig playfully teases him about his exercise. Daddy Pig happily declares he kept his cake, but Peppa reminds him they promised the rest to the ducks. Daddy Pig agrees, and Peppa offers her cake to the eager ducklings, who take a bite, creating a warm picnic atmosphere.

Beverage Aisle.description: A blue bottle with a white star label and a yellow juice carton, placed on the picnic blanket.

Grapes.description: A bunch of purple grapes on a white plate, part of the picnic spread, visible on the blanket.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue outfit, standing next to Peppa Pig, holding a plate with a slice of cake topped with a strawberry, smiling happily. He expresses concern for the ducklings, exclaiming, 'Oh no, we forgot to leave any for the ducks.'

Daddy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a teal shirt and glasses, initially holding a slice of cake with a strawberry, showing surprise and concern as he frantically exclaims 'Get away!', 'Scram!', 'Help! Whoa! Choo!', and 'Get it off me!' while running from a wasp. He later pants heavily, chuckles, and expresses delight, stating, 'Luckily, I managed to hang on to my slice of strawberry cake,' before a simple 'Oh' when reminded about the ducks.

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing an orange dress, standing beside Daddy Pig and the children, smiling warmly. She speaks calmly, reassuring Peppa that 'Daddy Pig is running too fast for the wasp to catch him,' and later playfully teases Daddy Pig, saying, 'You said you would run around and get some exercise, Daddy Pig, but I didn't believe you'd do it!'

Watermelon.description: A large green watermelon with dark stripes, placed on a plate on the picnic blanket, partially sliced, contributing to the colorful spread.

Pond.description: A small, oval-shaped blue pond surrounded by green grass and yellow flowers, where three ducklings swim and are fed by George Pig.

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, standing beside her family, holding a plate with a slice of cake topped with a strawberry. She expresses concern, 'I hope the wasp doesn't sting, Daddy,' and later suggests, 'Let's eat our cake before the wasp comes back.' She laughs playfully, then firmly tells Daddy Pig, 'Stop, Daddy! We promised the rest of the cake for the ducks,' as she offers her cake to the ducklings, affectionately calling them 'very lucky ducks.'

Bee.description: A small yellow and black striped insect with white wings, flying near the picnic. It is identified by Peppa as a 'wasp' and causes Daddy Pig to panic and run.

Picnic Blanket.description: A red-and-white checkered blanket spread on a grassy hill, serving as the centerpiece for the picnic, with plates of food including watermelon, grapes, cheese, and sandwiches. The sound of it being spread is heard.

Salad Bowl.description: A striped purple and white bowl filled with chopped vegetables, placed on the picnic blanket.

Cake.description: A slice of yellow cake with a pink layer and a strawberry on top, served on a white plate, initially held by the family. Daddy Pig manages to hold onto his slice, and Peppa later offers hers to the ducklings, with one taking a bite of the strawberry.

Ducklings.description: Three small yellow ducklings with orange beaks and feet, waddling toward the picnic blanket, making distinct quacking sounds. They eagerly approach Peppa's cake, and one takes a bite of the strawberry, accompanied by a chime sound.

Cheese.description: A block of yellow cheese with holes, placed on a white plate on the picnic blanket, part of the picnic food.

Sandwiches.description: Two long sandwiches with green fillings, served on white plates on the picnic blanket, later eaten by the family.

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of Peppa Pig smiling and winking. The scene transitions to a grassy outdoor setting where Peppa stands by a small blue pond as a yellow duckling swims toward her. George Pig's young voice asks, "want some more?" but Mummy Pig states, "That was the last of the bread. I'm sure they've had enough," as a duck quacks. George apologizes to "Mrs. Duck," confirming, "we've no more bread," amidst more quacks. The camera reveals three ducklings in the pond, surrounded by yellow flowers. Daddy Pig, wearing his teal shirt, spreads a red-and-white checkered picnic blanket on a grassy hill, with a yellow basket nearby. He observes, "The ducks want more food," followed by a snorting sound. The family—Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George—gather around the blanket, smiling as Daddy Pig joins them, commenting, "So much for Daddy Pig and his exercise," after another snort. The picnic spread includes watermelon, grapes, cheese, a salad bowl, and a thermos. As the ducklings approach the blanket, George suggests, "Mummy, we do have strawberry cake," and Mummy Pig agrees, "Well, if there's any cake left over, you can give it to the ducks," followed by a quack. Mummy Pig offers a slice of cake to one duckling, which happily accepts, while Daddy Pig remarks, "Everyone likes Mummy Pig's homemade strawberry cake." The family then each receives a slice of cake topped with a strawberry. Suddenly, a bee, making a distinct buzzing sound, flies toward the cake. Mummy Pig exclaims, "Oh, a wasp! I hate wasps! Shoo!" Daddy Pig reacts with surprise, then laughs, waving it away, calmly stating, "What a fuss Mummy Pig. It's only a little wasp." Mummy Pig shouts, "Go away wasp!" as the bee lands on the strawberry. Daddy Pig gently removes it, advising, "Just stay still Mummy Pig, then it will fly away," and concludes, "There, you see, all you had to do was stay still," as the family continues to enjoy their picnic under the sunny sky, with background music fading.

The video opens with a close-up of Daddy Pig, wearing his teal shirt and glasses, holding a slice of strawberry-topped cake, looking surprised as a bee (identified by Peppa as a 'wasp') flies near him. Daddy Pig frantically exclaims 'Get away!', 'Scram!', and 'Help! Whoa! Choo! Get it off me!' as he seemingly runs from the insect. Peppa Pig expresses concern, asking, 'I hope the wasp doesn't sting, Daddy.' Mummy Pig calmly reassures, 'No, Daddy Pig is running too fast for the wasp to catch him,' while Daddy Pig continues his panicked 'Whoa! Whoa!' The scene transitions to a wide shot of a sunny, grassy hill under a bright blue sky where the wasp buzzes. Peppa then suggests, 'Let's eat our cake before the wasp comes back.' Daddy Pig spreads a red-and-white checkered picnic blanket on the hill, accompanied by the sound of the blanket being laid out, revealing a spread of food including watermelon, grapes, cheese, and sandwiches. Gentle, cheerful background music begins to play. Three yellow ducklings appear, waddling toward the blanket with distinct quacking sounds. George Pig, seeing them, exclaims, 'Oh no, we forgot to leave any for the ducks.' Daddy Pig, panting heavily from his earlier chase, states, 'I think I lost it.' Mummy Pig playfully teases him, 'You said you would run around and get some exercise, Daddy Pig, but I didn't believe you'd do it!' Peppa laughs, and Daddy Pig chuckles, then delightedly declares, 'Luckily, I managed to hang on to my slice of strawberry cake.' Peppa quickly interjects, 'Stop, Daddy! We promised the rest of the cake for the ducks.' Daddy Pig simply responds 'Oh,' as Peppa offers her cake to the ducklings, who eagerly approach. A chime sound and a quack accompany one duckling taking a bite of the strawberry. The family watches with joy as Peppa affectionately tells the ducklings, 'You are very lucky ducks,' creating a warm, playful picnic atmosphere.

event_blocks.summary: Three yellow ducklings waddle across a green hill under a bright blue sky, quacking cheerfully. Mummy Pig instructs Peppa Pig to thank Daddy Pig, who smiles holding a yellow basket filled with picnic items and replies, "You're most welcome." The family, including George Pig, gathers around the ducklings, with Peppa offering cake to one. Mummy Pig announces it's time to go home, and Peppa says, "Bye-bye, ducks!" The Red Car drives up a grassy hill with the family and basket inside, its engine audible, as Peppa exclaims, "See you next time!" The scene shifts to a sunny hilltop with a yellow house, and the title 'Hiccups' appears with a flute melody and Peppa's voice saying, "Hiccups!" Inside the Kitchen, the family sits at the Dinner Table eating yellow peas and drinking orange juice, while Daddy Pig pours milk. A narrator explains they are having breakfast on a sunny day and Peppa and George want to play in the garden. Peppa asks to play, and Mummy Pig says they can after breakfast. Peppa and George eat happily, George spills peas with a slurping sound, and Peppa laughs. Daddy Pig tells George not to drink his juice too quickly, just as George hiccups. Daddy Pig joins Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George at the blue round dinner table, eating yellow peas. George accidentally spills peas, punctuated by more hiccups. A narrator explains George drank his juice too quickly and now has hiccups, and Daddy Pig hiccups loudly. Peppa asks to play, but Mummy Pig says not while George has hiccups. Peppa insists George's hiccups are gone, but he hiccups again, followed by another loud hiccup from Daddy Pig. Mummy Pig agrees they can play outside, telling Peppa to look after George. Outdoors, under a bright blue sky with a green hill and yellow house, birds chirp. The narrator states Peppa and George love playing in the garden. Peppa, holding a colorful spotted ball, tells George she will throw it and he must catch it. George, hesitant and sad, takes the ball, hiccuping. Peppa asks him to stop hiccuping. George hiccups again, prompting Daddy Pig to hiccup loudly and call, "George!" Peppa instructs George to throw the ball. George appears hesitant and sad, shaking his head and stepping back, with a narrator stating, "Oh dear, George's hiccups are spoiling the game," as George emits distinct hiccup sounds. Peppa, with a cheerful expression, calls out "George!" and declares, "I know how to cure hiccups," instructing him to "Rub the top of your head and rub your tummy." George attempts this, hiccups punctuated by a giggle, as playful music begins. Peppa announces, "Good. Now your hiccups have gone," but George immediately hiccups again, prompting the narrator to confirm, "Peppa's cure for hiccups doesn't seem to have worked." Peppa playfully scolds, "George, you've done it all wrong!" before proposing, "I know a better way to cure hiccups." She instructs him to "jump up and down three times on one leg" and then to "wave your arms up and down and stick your tongue out." George attempts these new cures, accompanied by bouncy music and a final hiccup followed by a loud, exaggerated raspberry sound. George's expression visibly softens from reluctance to a tentative smile, eventually opening his mouth in excitement, culminating in both pigs standing side by side, smiling and gesturing happily.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue outfit. He is initially hesitant and sad due to persistent hiccups, which are clearly heard throughout the segment. He attempts Peppa's various hiccup cures, showing a gradual shift from reluctance to a tentative smile and then open-mouthed excitement, despite his hiccups continuing and being punctuated by giggles and a loud raspberry sound.

Daddy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a teal shirt and glasses, initially surprised then smiling. He has a deep male voice, advises George not to drink juice too quickly, makes loud, deep hiccup sounds himself, and calls out George's name.

Peas.description: Yellow round peas served in striped bowls at the dinner table, eaten by the family, with George accidentally spilling some onto the table.

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing an orange dress, seated at the dinner table, smiling warmly. She has a calm female voice, initially refusing Peppa's request to play due to George's hiccups, but eventually allowing them to go out and play, reminding them to look after George.

Hiccups Title Card.description: A bright blue sky background with a yellow sun, white clouds, a green hill, a yellow house with a red roof, and the word 'Hiccups' in red text, signaling the start of a new episode, introduced by a whimsical melody and Peppa's voice saying 'Hiccups!'.

Dinner Table.description: A round blue table set with striped bowls of peas, glasses of water, and black spoons, where the family gathers to eat together.

Kitchen.description: An indoor kitchen with yellow walls, a window with green curtains, a clock showing 10:10, a sink, and a refrigerator with magnets, where the family eats dinner.

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, holding a colorful spotted ball. She is cheerful and encouraging, offering the ball to George, and then actively trying to cure his hiccups by giving instructions in a confident, sometimes playfully scolding, voice. She calls George by name and believes her cures will work.

Red Car.description: A red car with a smiling face, driving up a grassy hill with the family inside, stopping to set up the picnic, accompanied by engine starting and driving sounds.

House.description: A yellow two-story house with a red roof, situated on a green hill, visible in the background during the outdoor scene.

Ducklings.description: Three small yellow ducklings with orange beaks and feet, waddling toward the picnic blanket, interacting with the family, and one taking a bite of the strawberry from Peppa’s cake, making distinct quacking sounds.

Yellow Basket.description: A woven yellow basket filled with bread, cheese, and a bottle, carried by Daddy Pig and placed in the car trunk, then later held as he sets up the picnic.

Colorful Spotted Ball.description: A white ball with large colorful spots (yellow, green, purple, orange), held by Peppa Pig and initially offered to George, serving as the central object of interaction, though the focus quickly shifts to George's hiccups.

raw_segments: The segment opens with three yellow ducklings waddling across a green hill under a bright blue sky, their distinct quacks accompanied by cheerful background music. Mummy Pig's voice is heard instructing, "Say thank you to Daddy Pig," as Daddy Pig, wearing his teal shirt and glasses, smiles while holding a yellow basket filled with picnic items. He responds in a deep voice, "You're most welcome," followed by a chuckle. The family—Peppa Pig in her red dress, George Pig in his blue outfit, and Mummy Pig in her orange dress—gather around the ducklings, with Peppa joyfully offering a slice of cake topped with a strawberry to one of them. Mummy Pig then announces, "It's time to go home. Say goodbye to the ducks," to which Peppa replies, "Bye-bye, ducks!" The Red Car, with a smiling face, drives up a grassy hill with the family and basket inside, its engine sounds audible, as Peppa exclaims, "See you next time!" and giggles. The car continues driving with cheerful music playing, before the scene shifts to a sunny hilltop with a yellow house. The title 'Hiccups' appears in red text, introduced by a whimsical flute melody and Peppa's voice saying, "Hiccups!" Inside the Kitchen, the family sits at the Dinner Table, eating bowls of yellow peas with orange juice, while Daddy Pig pours milk. The clock on the wall shows 10:10, and a narrator's voice explains, "Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy are having breakfast. It is a lovely sunny day, and Peppa and George can't wait to go into the garden to play." Peppa's voice then asks, "Mummy, please can we go out to play?" and Mummy Pig replies, "You can go out to play when you finish your breakfast." Peppa and George are seen happily eating, with George accidentally spilling peas, marked by a distinct slurping sound, while Peppa laughs. The scene ends with a close-up of Peppa’s joyful expression as she enjoys her meal, accompanied by continued eating sounds and whimsical music.

The video opens in the Pig family's kitchen, where Daddy Pig, wearing his teal shirt and glasses, initially appears concerned as he tells George, "Don't drink your juice too quickly," just as George emits a distinct hiccup sound. Daddy Pig then transitions to a cheerful expression, joining Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George at their blue round dinner table. The family eats yellow peas from striped bowls, with Peppa initially frowning but soon smiling, while George accidentally spills some peas, punctuated by more of his hiccups. A male narrator explains, "George drank his juice too quickly, and now he has hiccups." Daddy Pig himself lets out a deep hiccup. Peppa, with a child's voice, asks Mummy Pig, "Can we go out to play now, Mummy?" Mummy Pig, in her calm female voice, replies, "Not while George has hiccups." Peppa insists, "But George's hiccups have gone, Mummy. Haven't they, George?" only for George to hiccup again. Daddy Pig then makes another loud, deep hiccup. Mummy Pig finally relents, saying, "Oh, all right, you can go out and play, but look after George," as George hiccups and Peppa giggles. The scene shifts outdoors under a bright blue sky with a green hill and a yellow house in the background, accompanied by the sound of birds chirping. The narrator states, "Peppa and George love playing in the garden." Peppa, holding a colorful spotted ball, tells George, "George, I'm going to throw the ball, and then you have to catch it." George, looking hesitant and sad, takes the ball from Peppa, punctuated by another hiccup. Peppa, frustrated, asks, "George, please stop hiccuping." George hiccups again, prompting Daddy Pig to let out a final loud hiccup and call out, "George!" Peppa then instructs, "Now you throw..." as the segment ends.

The scene opens on a bright green grassy field under a clear blue sky, dotted with small yellow and white flowers, where Peppa Pig, in her signature red dress, holds a colorful spotted ball. She offers it to George Pig, dressed in his blue outfit, who initially appears hesitant and sad, shaking his head and stepping back. This reluctance is immediately clarified by a narrator stating, "Oh dear, George's hiccups are spoiling the game," as George emits distinct hiccup sounds. Peppa, with a cheerful expression, calls out "George!" and confidently declares, "I know how to cure hiccups," gesturing encouragingly. She instructs him, "You have to do what I say... Rub the top of your head and rub your tummy." George attempts this, his hiccups punctuated by a giggle, as playful background music begins. Peppa then announces, "Good. Now your hiccups have gone," but George immediately hiccups again, prompting the narrator to confirm, "Peppa's cure for hiccups doesn't seem to have worked." Peppa playfully scolds, "George, you've done it all wrong!" before proposing, "I know a better way to cure hiccups." She instructs him to "jump up and down three times on one leg" and then to "wave your arms up and down and stick your tongue out." George attempts these new cures, accompanied by bouncy music and a final hiccup followed by a loud, exaggerated raspberry sound. Throughout these interactions, George's expression visibly softens from reluctance to a tentative smile, eventually opening his mouth in excitement, culminating in both pigs standing side by side, smiling and gesturing happily, emphasizing their joyful sibling bond despite the persistent hiccups.

event_blocks.summary: Under a clear blue sky on a sunny day in a green field, George Pig's hiccups are audible as Peppa Pig, in her red dress, offers him a spotted ball. George, in his blue outfit, hesitates and shakes his head, prompting Peppa's suggestion to close his eyes and turn around, a 'cure' that the narrator notes has failed. George lies down on the grass, pouting. Peppa, concerned, explains her next plan: to shock George to cure his hiccups, assuring him it's a game. As George begins to smile and they laugh together, Peppa reiterates it's pretend scaring. George then sneezes loudly, startling Peppa, and begins to cry. Mummy Pig, in an orange dress, rushes in, picks up George, and scolds Peppa for playing too roughly. A worried Peppa apologizes, explaining her intention to stop his hiccups, as Mummy Pig comforts the upset George.

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing an orange dress, who rushes into the scene with a concerned expression, picks up George, and holds him close, comforting him as he looks upset. She has a distinct female voice, heard scolding Peppa for playing too roughly with George, stating he's 'only little.'

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, initially smiling and offering a colorful spotted ball to George, then encouraging him with gestures and expressions. She has a distinct child's voice, heard suggesting 'cures' for hiccups, explaining her plan to scare George, and later apologizing to Mummy Pig for playing too roughly. She shares a happy moment with George before reacting with surprise to his sneeze and then looking worried.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue outfit, initially hesitant and sad, making repeated hiccup sounds. He gradually softens his expression, smiles, and laughs with Peppa, before letting out a loud, exaggerated sneeze and then crying. He is comforted by Mummy Pig, looking upset. His name is mentioned by Peppa and the narrator.

raw_segments: The scene opens on a bright, sunny day in a simple green field under a clear blue sky, accompanied by the distinct sound of George Pig's hiccups. Peppa Pig, wearing her signature red dress, smiles and gestures cheerfully, offering a colorful spotted ball to her younger brother George, who is in his blue outfit. George initially looks hesitant and sad, shaking his head, as Peppa's child-like voice suggests a 'cure' involving closing eyes and turning around. A male narrator confirms that 'Peppa's new cure hasn't worked either,' and 'George still has hiccups,' while George remains reluctant, eventually lying down on the grass with a pout and frown. Peppa's expression shifts from cheerful to concerned, but her voice is heard explaining her next plan: 'To cure hiccups, the ill piggy must be given a shock,' and she tells George she's 'going to scare' him, but it's 'only a game.' As Peppa tries to cheer him up, George slowly begins to smile back, and they share a joyful moment, both laughing with open mouths, while Peppa's voice reminds him, 'this is just pretend scaring.' Suddenly, George lets out a loud, exaggerated sneeze, causing Peppa to jump back in surprise. This is immediately followed by George's crying sounds. Mummy Pig, wearing an orange dress, rushes in from the right, looking alarmed, and gently picks up George, holding him close. Mummy Pig's distinct female voice scolds Peppa, saying, 'you mustn't play so roughly with George. He's only little.' Peppa, now looking worried, apologizes, 'Sorry, Mummy. I was just trying to stop...' as the atmosphere shifts from playful to slightly tense while Mummy Pig comforts an upset George.

event_blocks.summary: Under a clear blue sky on a grassy field, Mummy Pig, dressed in an orange dress, holds an excitedly jumping George Pig, clad in blue, as a narrator notes "George's hiccups," which Daddy Pig then announces are gone. Playful, upbeat music starts as Daddy Pig, wearing a teal shirt and glasses, approaches Peppa Pig carrying a yellow tray with two glasses of orange juice, stating, "Here comes Daddy Pig with two beakers of juice." Daddy Pig gives Peppa a glass; as she sips, Mummy Pig warns George, "George, if you drink too quickly, you will get hiccups again," while George looks surprised. Peppa, taking another sip, confidently asserts, "I'm not as little as George. I can drink juice as quickly as I want to." George's juice audibly slurps and magically changes color from orange to green, surprising him, just before he lets out a loud sneeze, prompting concern from Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig, with Mummy Pig rushing to hold him and Daddy Pig looking worried, while Peppa laughs heartily. The family then lies down on the grass, their joyful laughter filling the air as they roll around playfully, Peppa rolling with a big smile, concluding in shared joy.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig wearing a blue outfit, initially jumping excitedly, then drinking juice that changes color, expressing surprise with sounds, sneezing loudly, and being comforted by Mummy Pig before joining the family in rolling on the grass with joyful laughter. His hiccups are mentioned by the narrator and Daddy Pig.

Yellow Tray.description: A round yellow tray held by Daddy Pig, carrying two tall blue glasses filled with orange juice, used to serve the family during their outdoor moment.

Daddy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing a teal shirt and glasses, carrying a yellow tray with two glasses of orange juice, handing one to Peppa, and reacting with concern when George sneezes, then joining the family in lying on the grass. He announces, 'George's hiccups have gone,' and introduces himself bringing juice, saying, 'Here comes Daddy Pig with two beakers of juice.'

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig wearing an orange dress, initially holding George, rushing to comfort him after his sneeze, and later lying on the grass laughing with the family. She warns George, 'George, if you drink too quickly, you will get hiccups again.'

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, initially smiling and drinking orange juice, then reacting with surprise as George’s juice changes color, laughing heartily at his sneeze, and finally rolling on the grass with a joyful expression. She confidently states, 'I'm not as little as George. I can drink juice as quickly as I want to,' and her distinctive laughter is heard.

raw_segments: The scene opens with Mummy Pig, wearing an orange dress, holding an excitedly jumping George Pig, who is in his blue outfit, on a grassy field under a clear blue sky, as a narrator mentions "George's hiccups." Daddy Pig's voice then announces, "George's hiccups have gone." Playful, upbeat music begins as Daddy Pig, in his teal shirt and glasses, walks toward Peppa Pig, carrying a yellow tray with two glasses of orange juice, his voice declaring, "Here comes Daddy Pig with two beakers of juice." Daddy Pig hands Peppa a glass, and as she takes a sip, Mummy Pig's voice warns, "George, if you drink too quickly, you will get hiccups again," while George watches with a surprised expression. Peppa then takes another sip, confidently stating, "I'm not as little as George. I can drink juice as quickly as I want to." A distinct slurping sound accompanies George's juice magically changing color from orange to green, which surprises him. Peppa smiles just before George lets out a loud sneeze. Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig react with concern, Mummy Pig rushing over to pick up and hold George close, while Daddy Pig looks worried, and Peppa laughs heartily. The family then all lie down on the grass together, their joyful laughter filling the air as they roll around playfully, with Peppa rolling over with a big smile, ending the scene in a moment of shared joy and laughter.

global_entity_library.Peppa Pig: A young pink pig wearing a red dress, initially smiling and drinking orange juice, then reacting with surprise as George’s juice changes color, laughing heartily at his sneeze, and finally rolling on the grass with a joyful expression. She confidently states, 'I'm not as little as George. I can drink juice as quickly as I want to,' and her distinctive laughter is heard.
global_entity_library.Watering Can: A green watering can used by Grandpa Pig to water the lettuce plants in the garden, producing splashing sounds.
global_entity_library.Yellow Basket: A woven yellow basket filled with bread, cheese, and a bottle, carried by Daddy Pig and placed in the car trunk, then later held as he sets up the picnic.
global_entity_library.Grandpa Pig: An older pink pig wearing a purple outfit, seated at the dinner table, smiling as the family enjoys their meal.
global_entity_library.Kitchen: An indoor kitchen with yellow walls, a window with green curtains, a clock showing 10:10, a sink, and a refrigerator with magnets, where the family eats dinner.
global_entity_library.Forks and Knives: Black utensils placed on the dinner table, used by the family to eat their meal.
global_entity_library.Dinner Table: A round blue table set with striped bowls of peas, glasses of water, and black spoons, where the family gathers to eat together.
global_entity_library.Salad Bowl: A striped purple and white bowl filled with chopped vegetables, placed on the picnic blanket.
global_entity_library.Pizza Slices: Triangular slices of pizza with colorful toppings, served on plates at the dinner table, and mentioned by Granny Pig as being made for lunch.
global_entity_library.Pea Pod: A large green pea pod creatively arranged on George’s plate with small green pea pieces and a tomato slice, designed to make the meal more appealing to him.
global_entity_library.Supermarket: An indoor setting with blue checkered flooring and shelves filled with colorful canned goods and packaged foods, including pineapple, strawberry, and green vegetable cans, as well as bags of yellow spiral-shaped snacks.
global_entity_library.Shopping Sign: A large oval sign with a green shopping basket icon, mounted on top of the supermarket building, with the word 'Shopping' appearing in purple text below it.
global_entity_library.Produce Section: An indoor area of the supermarket with shelves filled with fresh vegetables such as asparagus, radishes, potatoes, and pumpkins, visible as the family browses.
global_entity_library.Shopping Cart: A metal shopping cart with a basket, pushed by Daddy Pig, with George Pig seated inside, containing a bag of carrots and later the long yellow item.
global_entity_library.Handwritten Shopping List: A white piece of paper with blue scribbled text, held by Daddy Pig, used to track grocery items during the shopping trip, shown clearly as he checks off items.
global_entity_library.Carrots in Plastic Bag: A clear plastic bag containing several orange carrots with green tops, held by Peppa Pig after she selects them from the produce section, accompanied by sounds of being picked and counted.
global_entity_library.Beverage Aisle: A blue bottle with a white star label and a yellow juice carton, placed on the picnic blanket.
global_entity_library.Long Yellow Item: A long, yellow, curved vegetable or fruit, possibly a banana or squash, selected by Peppa Pig from the fruit shelf.
global_entity_library.Watermelon: A large green watermelon with dark stripes, placed on a plate on the picnic blanket, partially sliced, contributing to the colorful spread.
global_entity_library.Fruit Section: An indoor supermarket area with shelves displaying bananas, pineapples, watermelons, grapes, and other colorful fruits, where Mummy Pig and Peppa Pig make selections.
global_entity_library.Cashier Rabbit: A white rabbit with long ears, wearing a yellow shirt, operating a beige cash register with a digital display, scanning groceries with a smile.
global_entity_library.Chocolate Cake: A round, brown, multi-layered chocolate cake with a decorative wavy pattern on the base, placed on the checkout counter and scanned by the cashier. It becomes the subject of a family discussion, with Daddy Pig admitting to adding it for pudding, and is enthusiastically desired by the children.
global_entity_library.Cash Register: A beige electronic cash register with a green digital display showing increasing totals (0.45, 0.69, 3.95, 8.99), and a receipt printer spitting out a paper receipt. It emits distinct 'beep' sounds as items are scanned.
global_entity_library.Picnic Title Card: A bright blue sky background with a yellow sun, white clouds, a green hill, a yellow house with a red roof, and the word 'Picnic' in green text, signaling the next scene.
global_entity_library.Picnic Blanket: A red-and-white checkered blanket spread on a grassy hill, serving as the centerpiece for the picnic, with plates of food including watermelon, grapes, cheese, and sandwiches. The sound of it being spread is heard.
global_entity_library.Grapes: A bunch of purple grapes on a white plate, part of the picnic spread, visible on the blanket.
global_entity_library.Sandwiches: Two long sandwiches with green fillings, served on white plates on the picnic blanket, later eaten by the family.
global_entity_library.Ducklings: Three small yellow ducklings with orange beaks and feet, waddling toward the picnic blanket, interacting with the family, and one taking a bite of the strawberry from Peppa’s cake, making distinct quacking sounds.
global_entity_library.Pond: A small, oval-shaped blue pond surrounded by green grass and yellow flowers, where three ducklings swim and are fed by George Pig.
global_entity_library.Cheese: A block of yellow cheese with holes, placed on a white plate on the picnic blanket, part of the picnic food.
global_entity_library.Bee: A small yellow and black striped insect with white wings, flying near the picnic. It is identified by Peppa as a 'wasp' and causes Daddy Pig to panic and run.
global_entity_library.Cake: A slice of yellow cake with a pink layer and a strawberry on top, served on a white plate, initially held by the family. Daddy Pig manages to hold onto his slice, and Peppa later offers hers to the ducklings, with one taking a bite of the strawberry.
global_entity_library.Peas: Yellow round peas served in striped bowls at the dinner table, eaten by the family, with George accidentally spilling some onto the table.
global_entity_library.Hiccups Title Card: A bright blue sky background with a yellow sun, white clouds, a green hill, a yellow house with a red roof, and the word 'Hiccups' in red text, signaling the start of a new episode, introduced by a whimsical melody and Peppa's voice saying 'Hiccups!'.
global_entity_library.Colorful Spotted Ball: A white ball with large colorful spots (yellow, green, purple, orange), held by Peppa Pig and initially offered to George, serving as the central object of interaction, though the focus quickly shifts to George's hiccups.
global_entity_library.Yellow Tray: A round yellow tray held by Daddy Pig, carrying two tall blue glasses filled with orange juice, used to serve the family during their outdoor moment.
